title: Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies:
Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies!
